assignment_rule: Assign all dimension scores before inspecting model output. Sum the six dimensions and map the total to a label.

mission_phases.2: Four or more phases, or conditional phases.

action_types.0: One or two distinct action types.
action_types.1: Three or four distinct action types.
action_types.2: Five or more distinct action types.

context_sources.2: Four or more sources, or intentionally degraded or conflicting context.

constraints.2: Four or more constraints, or interacting constraints.

control_flow.1: Repetition or parallel behavior is required.
control_flow.2: Fallback, recovery, or conditional behavior is required.

spatial_reasoning.1: A supplied route or bounded area is used.
spatial_reasoning.2: A route, coverage plan, or target must be derived from context.
